page_subtitle: Meet the dedicated staff members working behind the scenes to advocate for the Malden community.

staff-01.bio: Alex has over a decade of experience in community organizing and public policy. Born and raised in Malden, they are dedicated to building sustainable partnerships that amplify local grassroots voices.

staff-02.bio: Sarah manages our community workshops, direct outreach initiatives, and volunteer cohorts. She coordinates logistics across our diverse local projects to ensure every voice is supported.
